title: Arceus origin
body:
You also need extra key binds but that is not on modrinth so heres a link to it: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-extra-keybinds

Arceus:

Impact - 3

description - You are a god that has shaped and created the universe with the thousand hands that you possess.
powers:

big boi - You are 3.9 blocks tall.

big inv - you have an area only you can access for storage

judgement - You jump in the air and land back down to the ground with great destruction.
Travel - Travel between ultra space and the overworld.

Shadow Force - You teleport gaining strength 2 and blinding all that is around you when you use it. Take this to your advantage and sneak up on your opponent.

Universal God - You are a god that existed before the universe did, so you have double the health of a human.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Wooper:

Impact - 3

description - You are the most power creature in the world
powers:

smol - You are 7 pixels tall.

Water Dependency - Your skin loses moisture over time. Running low on moisture causes you to walk slower, take more damage and lose more hunger!

Small Body - You are small enough to be picked up in a bucket.

Cave Dweller - Having evolved in the Caves, you are adapted to underground life but not so much for the surface, your eyes included, making you see worse in bright light (unless you have more than 45% moisture) but able to see better in the dark. You also move faster and exhaust slower in pitch darkness and are unable to sleep in overly bright light.

Relief - You know how it feels really good when you step into a fully air-conditioned room when it's scorching outside? You as an Axolotl moistening when dry is basically like that, meaning you swim faster and see better underwater when your moisture is below max.

skin - your skin was tinted blue

Amphibious - You're able to breathe both on the land and in the water, and you can swim a little faster!
